chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Misc: Application No.S-400 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For hearing of M.A No.1932/2026 (Contempt) 02.04.2026 Mr.Khalid Hussain Lakho, D.P.G for State ********** Applicant Aarib Shah is present in person and submits a copy of FIR No. 90 of 2026, registered on 27.03.2026, taken on record. In the circumstances, listed M.A. No. 1932 of 2026 stands disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
